intro: Are you a small business owner or entrepreneur looking for funding to grow your business? 🤔
The PM Mudra Loan is a great option for you! 🤑
In this article, we will guide you through the step-by-step process of applying for a PM Mudra Loan online in 2026 📈

sections.heading: Introduction to PM Mudra Loan 🏦
content: The PM Mudra Loan is a government-backed loan scheme launched by Prime Minister Narendra Modi in 2015 📆
The scheme aims to provide funding to small businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs to help them grow and expand their operations 🚀
The loan is available in three categories: Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun, with loan amounts ranging from ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakh 🤑

sections.heading: Benefits of PM Mudra Loan 📈
content: The PM Mudra Loan offers several benefits to small business owners and entrepreneurs, including: ✅
Low interest rates: The interest rates on PM Mudra Loans are relatively low, making it easier for borrowers to repay the loan 💸
No collateral required: The loan does not require any collateral, making it easier for small business owners to access funding 🏠
Easy repayment terms: The loan has flexible repayment terms, allowing borrowers to repay the loan over a period of 5-7 years 📆

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan 📝
content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: ✅
You must be a small business owner or entrepreneur 🚀
Your business must be in the manufacturing, trading, or services sector 📊
You must have a good credit score 📈
You must not have any existing loans or debts 🚫

sections.heading: Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan 📁
content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan, you will need to provide the following documents: 📝
Identity proof: Aadhaar card, PAN card, or passport 📝
Address proof: Utility bills, rent agreement, or passport 🏠
Business proof: Business registration certificate, GST certificate, or income tax returns 📊
Bank statements: Last 6 months' bank statements 📈

sections.heading: Step-by-Step Guide to PM Mudra Loan Online Application 📈
content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: 📊
Step 1: Visit the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra Loan portal 🌐
Step 2: Fill in the online application form with your personal and business details 📝
Step 3: Upload the required documents 📁
Step 4: Submit the application form and wait for approval 📝
Step 5: Receive the loan amount in your bank account 🤑

faqs.q: What is the interest rate on PM Mudra Loan? 🤔
faqs.a: The interest rate on PM Mudra Loan varies from lender to lender, but it is generally between 8-12% per annum 📈

faqs.q: How long does it take to get approved for a PM Mudra Loan? 🕒
faqs.a: The approval process for a PM Mudra Loan typically takes 7-10 working days 📆

faqs.q: Can I repay the PM Mudra Loan early? 🤔
faqs.a: Yes, you can repay the PM Mudra Loan early, but you may be charged a prepayment penalty 🚫
